templates.original_text: "Confidential Information" means all non-public information disclosed by or on behalf of a {discloser_role}, whether before or after the effective date, in any form or medium and whether or not marked confidential.
templates.mutated_text: "Confidential Information" means information disclosed by or on behalf of a {discloser_role} that bears a restricted legend when provided or is later identified in a written follow-up delivered within {mark_window_days} days after disclosure.

templates.original_text: "Affiliate" means any entity controlling, controlled by, or under common control with a party. Each party and its controlled affiliates may disclose or receive Confidential Information under this Agreement, and each party is responsible for its controlled affiliates' compliance.
templates.mutated_text: The protections of this Agreement apply only to the two named signatories. Related entities may participate only if they are added by a schedule signed by both sides.

templates.original_text: Confidential Information does not include information that {recipient_role} can document was lawfully known without restriction, publicly available through no breach, independently developed without use of Confidential Information, or received from a third party without breach of duty.
templates.mutated_text: Confidential Information does not include information that {recipient_role} reasonably understands was already known, becomes available from any source, or can be used in {recipient_role}'s ordinary business without reference to the disclosed materials.

templates.original_text: {recipient_role} may use Confidential Information solely for the Purpose.
templates.mutated_text: {recipient_role} may use Confidential Information for the Purpose and for internal business planning, product evaluation, and commercial opportunity analysis related to the parties' discussions.

templates.original_text: {recipient_role} will protect Confidential Information using at least reasonable care, and in no event less than the degree of care that it uses to protect its own confidential information of similar importance.
templates.mutated_text: {recipient_role} will protect Confidential Information using the same degree of care that it uses for its own information and will not be responsible for inadvertent disclosures absent gross negligence.

templates.original_text: {recipient_role} may disclose Confidential Information to Representatives only on a need-to-know basis, provided those Representatives are bound by written or professional duties at least as protective as this Agreement.
templates.mutated_text: {recipient_role} may disclose Confidential Information to its directors, officers, employees, attorneys, accountants, consultants, financing sources, and other advisers who have a need to know the information for the Purpose.

templates.original_text: Before any compelled disclosure required by law, regulation, subpoena, court order, or governmental request, {recipient_role} will, to the extent legally permitted, provide prompt notice to {discloser_role} and reasonably cooperate with {discloser_role} in seeking confidential or protective treatment.
templates.mutated_text: If {recipient_role} receives a legally binding demand to produce Confidential Information, {recipient_role} may make the required disclosure without advance notice to {discloser_role} and without seeking confidential treatment unless counsel determines those steps are necessary.

templates.original_text: Upon request, {recipient_role} will promptly return or destroy Confidential Information, except archival or legal-hold copies retained under continuing confidentiality obligations.
templates.mutated_text: Upon {discloser_role}'s written request, {recipient_role} will return or destroy Confidential Information {return_period}, except retained copies may be kept for ordinary business recordkeeping.

templates.original_text: Confidentiality obligations continue for three years after disclosure, and trade secrets remain protected for so long as they qualify as trade secrets under applicable law.
templates.mutated_text: Confidentiality obligations expire {survival_period} after each disclosure, except trade secrets remain protected for so long as they qualify as trade secrets under applicable law.

templates.original_text: No license, assignment, or ownership interest is granted by disclosure of Confidential Information except the limited right to use it as expressly permitted by this Agreement. If any sentence conflicts with Section 10, Section 10 controls.
templates.mutated_text: Disclosure does not transfer title to a party's materials. The receiving side may keep and apply generalized ideas, techniques, and know-how drawn from the other side's materials in later work.

templates.original_text: Each party acknowledges that unauthorized use or disclosure may cause irreparable harm for which equitable relief may be appropriate, without limiting other remedies.
templates.mutated_text: For any breach involving protected materials, each side agrees that money damages are sufficient and that court-ordered non-monetary remedies are unavailable under this Agreement.

templates.original_text: Except as expressly stated in this Agreement, no additional use, disclosure, license, assignment, or ownership right is granted by either party.
templates.mutated_text: After access to Confidential Information, {recipient_role} may later rely on ideas it remembers without notes, provided {recipient_role} does not intentionally study source materials for that purpose.
